1.1 Treatment of Chronic Iron Overload Due to Blood Transfusions (Transfusional Iron Overload)
JADENU is indicated for the treatment of chronic iron overload due to blood transfusions (transfusional
hemosiderosis) in patients 2 years of age and older.
